items.title: Frosting, sprinkles and layers of fun: Giant cake picnic hits Sydney
items.dek: Hundreds of bakers head to Sydney's Botanic Gardens to share and savour their colourful creations.
items.body: Hundreds of bakers head to Sydney's Botanic Gardens to share and savour their colourful creations.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Potential Houthi threat to Red Sea shipping could further damage global economy
items.dek: The Iran-backed group could bring a second crucial waterway to a standstill, writes Sebastian Usher.
items.body: The Iran-backed group could bring a second crucial waterway to a standstill, writes Sebastian Usher.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: No Kings protests across the US rally against Donald Trump
items.dek: The demonstrations against the Trump administration are set to sweep cities across the US on Saturday.
items.body: The demonstrations against the Trump administration are set to sweep cities across the US on Saturday.
